name: Knock'em All
core_loop: Tap to shoot balls at approaching dummies, using physics to knock them off platforms and progress to the next level.
audience_proxy: Broad casual audience, all ages, looking for quick, satisfying physics-based action.
visual_style: Minimalist 3D with bright, flat colors and simple geometric environments.

palette.description: Bright, airy pastel backgrounds contrasting with vibrant primary colors for enemies and weapons.
